# Restocking Fee

At Acme Shop, a restocking fee of 15% of the purchase price applies to returns of electronics, large appliances, and furniture to cover processing costs. To qualify for a return, items must be in their original packaging and condition within 30 days, and all accessories must be included. Returns due to Acme Shop's error, such as defective or incorrect items, may waive the restocking fee if contacted promptly.

[Source: returns_policy.md#restocking-fee]
